narrative_beat: Wide de cavalo vermelho apocaliptico galopando, manto carmesim, espada elevada, fundo P&B de batalha

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a massive crimson warhorse mid-gallop charging from left to right, muscles rippling under blood-red hide, an anonymous armored rider in flowing crimson and gold battle robes raising a great sword overhead with both hands, the blade catching fire-light
subject.focal_point: the raised flaming sword and the rider's crimson robes billowing
subject.secondary: the horse's hooves kicking up dust and embers, mane flying wild
props: flowing crimson and gold battle robes

environment.location: a vast scorched battlefield stretching to the horizon
environment.atmosphere: war unleashed, the second seal broken, violence riding forth

composition.foreground: horse and rider in vivid crimson, gold, and blood-red dominating left-center
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white scorched battlefield, distant explosions, smoke columns

lighting.key_light: blood-orange fire glow from upper left illuminating rider and horse
lighting.fill_light: crimson reflected light from the horse's hide
lighting.rim_light: gold edge on sword blade and armor edges
lighting.shadow_quality: deep hard-edged shadows trailing behind the galloping horse

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares from sword glint
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, horse muscle texture, fabric weave visible on robes, floating orange embers dense in air

mood.emotion: war unleashed, punishment charging toward those who remain

symbolism.primary: the Red Horse of Revelation 6:4 — peace taken from the earth, war given
symbolism.secondary: the raised sword as divine mandate for conflict

negative_as_positive: anonymous rider with face hidden by helmet shadow and motion blur
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated battlefield background, vivid crimson and gold foreground only
tack-sharp focus on horse and rider

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
